details.test: Task 1: Enrollment flow for 3-year-old full-day program with meals and late pickup under $1100
Task 2: Schedule earliest available Tuesday morning tour (9-11am) next month
Task 3: Compare first two toddler classrooms by ratio and tuition and submit application
Task 4: RSVP to first Family Open House this month starting at or after 5:00 pm
Task 5: Set vegetarian, peanut-free lunch day and submit meal preference
Task 6: Tuition calculator estimate for 4-year-old with add-ons under $1400 and email
Task 7: Newsletter subscription with specific interests and monthly frequency
Task 8: Contact Pre-K teacher (5+ years, Master's) with curriculum question
Task 9: Weekly schedule plan for 2-year-old (35-40 hours, under $400/week)
